title: Sharps Disposal Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Sharps Disposal Programs 8 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COLUMBIA COUNTY GARBAGE AND RECYCLING SHARPS CONTAINER EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides containers to collect and dispose of sharps (medical devices such as hypodermic needles, fingersticks, and pen injectors). Eligibility: Residential use only Hours: Clatskanie Rural Fire Protection District, 280 SE 3rd Street, OR, 97016, Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Columbia County Transfer Station, 1601 Railroad Avenue, St. Helens, OR, 97051, Monday-Saturday 8am-5pm Columbia River Fire and Rescue-Rainier Station, 211 W 2nd Street, Rainier, OR, 97048, Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Mist-Birkenfeld Rural Fire Protection District, 12525 Highway 202, Mist, OR, 97016, Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Scappoose Rural Fire Distrct, 52751 Columbia River Highway, Scappoose, 97056, Monday-Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm Vernonia Rural Fire District, 555 E Bridge Street, Vernonia, OR, 97064, Monday-Thursday 9am-3:30pm Email (503) 397-7259 Visit Website More Details HYGIENE4ALL HYGIENE4ALL HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a community hygiene, sanitation, and safety hub. Provides showers, bedding in exchange for soiled, a clothing swap, menstruation and moontime hygiene supplies, first-aid kits, bathrooms, legal disposal for household trash and needles, foot, wound, and mouth care, and a warm outdoor space with coffee and tea. Also offers paid work and opportunities for advocacy. 824 SE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Homeless individuals and families Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 3pm-8:30pm Open regardless of weather. Last shower 45 minutes before close. Search for Hygiene4all Hub on Google Maps for unanticipated holiday or other closures. Email (971) 236-2524 Get Directions Visit Website More Details METRO METRO CENTRAL TRANSFER STATION HAZARDOUS WASTE DISPOSAL AND SHARPS CONTAINER EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hazardous waste disposal site. Accepts sharp objects including needles, acupuncture needles, lancets, syringes, paint, motor oil, antifreeze, other automotive fluids, light bulbs, household cleaners, batteries, and more. 35 gallon limit per day. 6161 NW 61st Avenue Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-4pm (503) 234-3000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details METRO METRO SOUTH TRANSFER STATION HAZARDOUS WASTE DISPOSAL AND SHARPS CONTAINER EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hazardous waste disposal site. Accepts sharp objects including needles, acupuncture needles, lancets, syringes, paint, motor oil, antifreeze, other automotive fluids, light bulbs, household cleaners, batteries, and more. 35 gallon limit per day. 2001 Washington Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-4pm (503) 234-3000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT MULTNOMAH COUNTY HARM REDUCTION CLINIC HEALTHY STREETS NEEDLE DISPOSAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Works to reduce the number of discarded syringes in downtown Portland. Injection drug users can dispose of used needles and syringes at two secure disposal bins located on Portland's waterfront. A biohazard contractor empties the bins regularly. The program also includes targeted outreach to injection drug users by Multnomah County health workers, and a public awareness campaign. 12425 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 988-3030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT SYRINGE DISPOSAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about safe needle disposal and locations for syringe disposal boxes. 619 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 988-3674 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SPECIAL EVENTS WASHINGTON COUNTY CENTRO CULTURAL OF WASHINGTON COUNTY HAZARDOUS WASTE COLLECTION EVENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hosting a Hazardous Waste Collection event to allow the safe disposal of medical syringes, needles, batteries, and other household hazardous materials — no appointment needed. Also accepting used electronics to donate to those in need. If you're bringing electronics, please include the cables. 1110 N Adair Street Cornelius, OR 97113 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: April 25, 2026 10am-1pm Email (503) 359-0446 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION AND SYRINGE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides new needles and a safe sharps disposal service. Offers hygiene and harm reduction supplies, including alcohol swabs, condoms, wound care items, and Naloxone/Narcan training and kits. Connects individuals with community resources and recovery support. All services are anonymous. 2111 8th Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Tillamook 2nd and 4th Wednesday of the month 11am-1pm The Herald Center 2710 First Street Tillamook, OR 97141, -Pacific City 1st Thursday of the month 11am-1pm Brooten Road Pacific City, OR 97135 -Wheeler 3rd Thursday of the month 11am-1pm Parking lot above North County Food Bank 278 Rowe St, Wheeler, OR 97147 Email (503) 842-3943 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HYGIENE4ALL HYGIENE4ALL HUB METRO HAZARDOUS WASTE DISPOSAL AND SHARPS CONTAINER EXCHANGE PROGRAM METRO HAZARDOUS WASTE DISPOSAL AND SHARPS CONTAINER EXCHANGE PROGRAM MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HEALTHY STREETS NEEDLE DISPOSAL PROGRAM MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT SYRINGE DISPOSAL SPECIAL EVENTS WASHINGTON COUNTY HAZARDOUS WASTE COLLECTION EVENT TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION AND SYRINGE SERVICES
